channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 stonerl/Thaw (2270 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: stonerl

📝 Repository: stonerl/Thaw

📄 Descrizione: Menu bar manager for macOS 26

⭐ Stelle: 2270

🍴 Forks: 50

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: macos macos-app menu-bar menubar menubar-app status-bar statusbar swift swiftui utility

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-29T18:26:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-27T03:30:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 f/textream (1933 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: f

📝 Repository: f/textream

📄 Descrizione: Textream is a free macOS teleprompter app for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It highlights your script in real-time as you speak, displayed in a beautiful Dynamic Island overlay. With extensible features.

⭐ Stelle: 1933

🍴 Forks: 129

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: macos macos-app streaming

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T09:20:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-08T02:48:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 cosZone/MoePeek (372 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cosZone

📝 Repository: cosZone/MoePeek

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight macOS selection translator built with pure Swift 6, featuring on-device Apple Translate for privacy, only 5MB install size and stable ~50MB memory usage. 一款轻量级 macOS 划词翻译工具，纯 Swift 6 开发，设备端 Apple 翻译保护隐私，安装体积仅 5MB，后台运行内存稳定约 50MB

⭐ Stelle: 372

🍴 Forks: 23

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: apple macos ocr short swift

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T12:29:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-07T21:26:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: EduAlexxis

📝 Repository: EduAlexxis/ByeTunes

📄 Descrizione: The first app of its kind: seamless, on-device music and ringtone injection for iOS. Bypass iTunes and manage your native library directly. Auto-fetch metadata, organize playlists, and keep your files clean. The true local music experience is here.

item.description:
👤 Owner: bysiber

📝 Repository: bysiber/cleardisk

📄 Descrizione: Free macOS menu bar app to visualize and clean developer caches (Xcode, node_modules, CocoaPods, SPM, Docker, pip, Cargo). Reclaim disk space instantly.

⭐ Stelle: 99

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: cache-cleaner developer-tools disk-analyzer disk-cleaner disk-space docker free-disk-space homebrew mac-cleanup macos macos-app menu-bar-app node-modules npm open-source storage-manager swift swiftui xcode xcode-deriveddata

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-28T20:02:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-07T23:33:24Z

item.title: 📝 Jstrom2022/tvbox-Swift (88 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Jstrom2022

📝 Repository: Jstrom2022/tvbox-Swift

📄 Descrizione: TVBox-Swift 是一套基于原生 Swift & SwiftUI 构建的跨平台多媒体应用核心工程。它同时支持 macOS 和 iOS 设备，致力于在双端提供无缝、现代且极其流畅的视听体验。
